content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — push entitlement present (App/DealAlerts.entitlements: aps-environment) and app schedules a repeating hourly promo notification (App/NotificationScheduler.swift:11-12) matching metadata spam promises ("alert you EVERY HOUR … unlimited notifications", fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt); may trigger review questions under 4.5.4/marketing-push rules.
Pierre: Apple prohibits using notifications for unsolicited hourly marketing spam without clear opt-in and value to the user, and reviewers do read metadata for such promises. Here both the code (a `repeats: true` 3600s promotional trigger) and the App Store description explicitly advertise hourly, unlimited deal blasts. Consider making promo notifications opt-in with frequency controls, and rewrite the description to avoid promising constant marketing pushes.
